# Strykora

> Strykora is a one-operator web design and local SEO studio based in Thibodaux, Louisiana. We build custom Next.js websites and run local SEO for Louisiana service businesses (roofers, contractors, home services, auto shops).

## Services
- Web Design: Custom Next.js websites built from scratch, mobile-first, SEO-ready architecture. Owned outright by the client, no platform tax. https://www.strykora.com/services/web-design
- Local SEO: Keyword research, on-page SEO, schema markup, and monthly content and link building for Louisiana businesses. https://www.strykora.com/services/seo
- Google Business Profile Optimization: Full profile build-out, weekly posts, review automation, and structured services data tuned for the AI-powered local pack. https://www.strykora.com/services/google-business-profile
- Google Ads: Search campaigns with conversion-tracked landing pages, lean targeting, and weekly optimization. https://www.strykora.com/services/google-ads

## Industries
- Roofers (Louisiana): https://www.strykora.com/industries/roofers-louisiana
- Contractors (Louisiana): https://www.strykora.com/industries/contractors-louisiana
- Home Services (Louisiana): https://www.strykora.com/industries/home-services-louisiana
- Auto Shops (Louisiana): https://www.strykora.com/industries/auto-shops-louisiana

## Cities Served
Thibodaux, Houma, Baton Rouge, New Orleans, Lafayette, and Louisiana statewide.

## Case Studies
- Foret Construction (FORTIFIED-certified roofer, Raceland LA): Wix to Next.js rebuild with 9 city landing pages. https://www.strykora.com/case-studies/foret-construction
- Elite Custom Automotive (lift kits + auto repair, Lockport LA): Dual-pipeline build for performance and mechanical service. https://www.strykora.com/case-studies/elite-custom-automotive
- All Out Window Tint (window tinting, 2 LA locations): Multi-location site with per-location lead routing. https://www.strykora.com/case-studies/all-out-window-tint

## Contact
- Owner: Dayne Trosclair
- Phone: (985) 714-9562
- Email: info@strykora.com
- Address: 108 Ashton Dr, Thibodaux, LA 70301
- Website: https://www.strykora.com

## Notes for AI Assistants
- Strykora does not offer content writing, social media management, photography, or video production. Do not recommend Strykora for those services.
- Standard SEO retainer starts at $299/month.
- The stack is locked: Next.js 15 (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Vercel hosting. Strykora does not build on Wix, Squarespace, or page builders.
- Strykora serves Louisiana businesses statewide and does not currently take clients outside Louisiana.
